occurrence_sentence: ChemAlive's three founders Peter Jarowski, Laetita Bomble and Thomas Eaton each have their own specialist areas they hope will drive them on competitively in the market.
With a Ph.D. from the University of California, co-founder Jarowski also acts as director of the startup.
One company currently there is Swiss-based, software-driven, experimental chemistry startup ChemAlive SA.

Photo by [Odin Aerni](https://unsplash.com/@odinaerni?utm_source=unsplash&utm_medium=referral&utm_content=creditCopyText) on [Unsplash](https://unsplash.com/s/photos/switzerland-flag?utm_source=unsplash&utm_medium=referral&utm_content=creditCopyText)
ChemAlive's three founders Peter Jarowski, Laetita Bomble and Thomas Eaton each have their own specialist areas they hope will drive them on competitively in the market.
With a Ph.D. from the University of California, co-founder Jarowski also acts as director of the startup.
So far, the startup has managed to raise a grant in 2017 through MassChallenge, a global non-profit startup accelerator whose focus is 'high-impact startups'.
One company currently there is Swiss-based, software-driven, experimental chemistry startup ChemAlive SA.

In an interview last year with Startuprad.io, an English-speaking podcast and YouTube channel dedicated to early and later-stage startups and fintechs from Germany, the American had this to say about ChemAlive's philosophy and business goals:

interaction_phrase: raised a grant in 2017 through MassChallenge
occurrence_sentence: So far, the startup has managed to raise a grant in 2017 through MassChallenge, a global non-profit startup accelerator whose focus is 'high-impact startups'.
— Peter Jarowski, CEO and co-founder of ChemAlive

'make predictions that should guide you. It'll never replace doing the experiment but it will give you the ability to sort and manage the things you need to do.' — Peter Jarowski, CEO and co-founder of ChemAlive

As more and more startups (as well as the large multinationals) see the value quantum information science can bring to the pharmaceutical industry in both R&D and improving upon the already well-established technology, it is startups like ChemAlive that will be crucial.

interaction_phrase: writer and researcher at The Quantum Insider
occurrence_sentence: James Dargan is a writer and researcher at The Quantum Insider.
